title: Readiness Policy 规则化架构优化
description: 继续架构优化：将 zj-loop-audit 中硬编码 readiness score/gates/findings 逐步迁移为声明式规则文件和规则引擎。

1.label: Readiness Policy 规则化架构优化

decisions.q: 下一段架构优化聚焦哪里？
decisions.answer: 聚焦 zj-loop-audit readiness policy 规则化。
decisions.note: 稳定架构文档已经把 CLI harness 收口；剩余明确 future slice 是 tools/zj-loop-audit/rules/readiness.v1.yaml。代码事实显示 computeScore/findings/recommendations 仍硬编码在 auditor.ts，且架构文档要求 rule engine 消费 evidence、不直接读项目文件。

1-1.label: 审计现有 readiness policy 硬编码边界

decisions.q: readiness policy 硬编码边界如何分层迁移？
decisions.answer: 先迁 score、level gates、assessment bands；findings/recommendations 后迁。
decisions.note: 代码事实显示 computeScore 是纯函数且已有直接单元测试，适合作为规则引擎 tracer bullet；auditProject 同时负责 evidence 收集、finding 文案、recommendation 文案和动态 git/activity 检测，第一刀迁移会扩大风险。

1-1.notes: Audited auditor.ts. Policy is hardcoded across SCORE_WEIGHTS/LEVEL_THRESHOLDS, computeScore gates and assessment bands, plus auditProject findings/recommendations. First tracer bullet should keep evidence collection and report text stable while moving score/level/assessment into a declarative rule contract.

1-2.label: 设计 readiness.v1.yaml 最小规则契约

decisions.q: readiness.v1.yaml 是否引入完整表达式语言？
decisions.answer: 不引入。第一版只支持命名 predicates、signal path 条件、all/any/not 组合、score contributions、level gates 和 assessment bands。
decisions.note: 当前 computeScore 的逻辑可由固定 DSL 覆盖：boolean signal、count threshold、derived predicates、score add、level gate、assessment band。完整表达式语言会增加解析、安全和测试复杂度，没有真实需求。

decisions.q: 规则引擎放在 core 还是 zj-loop-audit？
decisions.note: 架构边界要求 core 不拥有 readiness scoring presentation；第一版规则引擎只服务 audit policy，放 audit 包可避免 core 变成所有策略的收纳处。以后若多个工具消费同一 readiness contract，再评估抽到 core。

1-2.notes: Defined a minimal readiness.v1.yaml contract: score base/contributions, named predicates, all/any/not/path conditions, ordered level gates, and ordered assessment bands. No general expression language.

1-3.label: 实现规则引擎 tracer bullet
1-3.notes: Implemented the tracer bullet: added tools/zj-loop-audit/rules/readiness.v1.yaml and src/readiness-rules.ts, moved computeScore to evaluate the declarative score/level/assessment policy, kept auditProject evidence collection and report text unchanged, and added direct rules DSL coverage.

1-4.label: 迁移 findings 和 recommendations 到规则文件

decisions.q: findings/recommendations 迁移是否引入模板语言？
decisions.answer: 不引入完整模板语言，只支持简单 signal path 占位。
decisions.note: 当前动态文案只有 state file 列表和 loop activity evidence 数量；用 、 这类占位即可覆盖，避免把报告文案规则文件变成第二门语言。

decisions.answer: 使用简单 signal path 占位，不引入完整模板语言。
decisions.note: 动态文案只需要 {stateFile.paths} 和 {loopActivity.evidence.length} 这类占位即可覆盖；占位符按 signal path 读取，数组默认用 comma+space 连接。

1-4.notes: Migrated audit findings and recommendations into readiness.v1.yaml guidance rules. auditProject now collects evidence, computes score/level/assessment, and asks the rule engine for findings/recommendations. Guidance supports simple signal path templates only.

1-5.label: 合并设计记录并删除 readiness policy roadmap
